hooks.prompt:
ADVISORY PRE-PUSH REVIEW — this is informational only, never block the push.

Run these shell commands to get the changes:
  git diff HEAD~1..HEAD --stat
  git diff HEAD~1..HEAD

Then run these three checks and report findings:

📋 REVIEW (always)
Look for: obvious bugs, wrong Airtable field names used as strings, missing error handling, logic errors, incorrect API field names.

🔒 SECURITY (if any changed file is under src/app/api/, or contains 'auth', 'password', 'cookie', 'token', 'admin')
Look for: exposed secrets, missing auth checks, PII leaking into logs or responses, SQL/injection risks.

✨ SIMPLIFY (only if total lines changed >100 OR files changed >5)
Look for: duplicated logic that could be a shared function, overly complex conditionals, repeated Airtable field name strings that should be constants.

Format output exactly as:
📋 REVIEW: <findings, or 'No issues found'>
🔒 SECURITY: <findings, or 'Not triggered — no API/auth files changed'>
✨ SIMPLIFY: <suggestions, or 'Not triggered — small change (<100 lines)'>

✅ Push proceeding.

IMPORTANT: Always end with '✅ Push proceeding.' and never block the push regardless of findings.
